FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Land Rush
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Word has spread of unclaimed, resource-rich land near your empire's borders. Prospectors, farmers, and entrepreneurs are eager to stake their claims. The opportunity could reduce the cost of founding new settlements, enrich existing ones, or simply fill your treasury through land auctions.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Encourage new settlement. Lower the barriers and let pioneers claim the land.
Auction the land rights. Let the highest bidder take the risk.
Annex the land for our existing settlements. More territory means more workers.
Grant fiefdoms to loyal vassals. Land for loyalty.
Claim the land and found new outposts immediately. We were made for this.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Land Rush Boom
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: With reduced founding costs, pioneers rush to claim the new territory. The surge of activity creates favorable conditions for establishing new settlements across your empire.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Land Auction
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The auction draws wealthy buyers from across the region. Bidding is fierce, and the final prices exceed expectations. Your treasury swells with the proceeds.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Territory Expanded
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your existing settlements annex the newly discovered land, expanding their borders and attracting new workers drawn by the opportunity. The additional territory permanently increases workforce capacity.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Fiefdoms Granted
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The new territory is divided among your most loyal vassals, each granted a fief in exchange for continued service and fealty. The recipients pour their personal resources into developing the land, expanding the workforce and deepening their loyalty to the crown.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Territory Claimed
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your expansion apparatus springs into action with practiced efficiency. Surveyors mark boundaries, supply trains are dispatched, and the infrastructure for new settlements is laid out before the dust settles.
